Heading: Vianet Communication Ltd.
Abstract:
vianet: Vianet Communication Ltd. is a leading Internet & TV service provider in Nepal. Since 24 years, Vianet Communication has always remained at the forefront, providing reliable and affordable Fiber Broadband Internet Services. In 2011, Vianet Communication pioneered Fiber Optics Internet or commonly known as FTTH internet service in Nepal. In 2016, Vianet partnered with NET TV to provide exceptional quality IPTV service with more than 230 channels including 80+ HD channels and state-of-the-art features such as the ability to Pause & Play live TV, watch Movies on Demand from NET TV movie collection, 1 week auto-recording which allows users to rewind and play missed episodes and TV Anywhere feature which allows users to watch TV channels on their mobile and laptop devices.
	Vianet is known for their outstanding quality of service and customer centric approach. With a Call Centre of more than 150 people available 24/7 365 days of the year, Vianet ensures that customers are able to reach them easily and at any time. As a part of its service offering, Vianet also provides intuitive self-service client-customer portal and innovative customer mobile app to its customers for managing, monitoring and receiving support services easily.
	Vianet provides an array of Internet and TV solutions for Home, Small Offices and Large Enterprises. Additional services provided include Web Hosting, Corporate Lease Line, Dual Fiber Ring Backup and Hotel TV solution.
